text: وَ بِکُفْرِهِمْ‌ وَ قَوْلِهِمْ‌ عَلَى‌ مَرْيَمَ‌ بُهْتَاناً عَظِيماً

en.ahmedali: And because they denied and spoke dreadful calumnies of Mary;
en.ahmedraza: And because they disbelieved and slandered Maryam with a tremendous accusation.
en.arberry: and for their unbelief, and their uttering against Mary a mighty calumny,
en.daryabadi: And for their blasphemy and for their speaking against Maryam a mighty calumny.
en.hilali: And because of their (Jews) disbelief and uttering against Maryam (Mary) a grave false charge (that she has committed illegal sexual intercourse);
en.itani: And for their faithlessness, and their saying against Mary a monstrous slander.
en.maududi: and for their going so far in unbelief as uttering against Mary a mighty calumny,
en.mubarakpuri: And because of their disbelief and uttering against Maryam a grave false charge.
en.pickthall: And because of their disbelief and of their speaking against Mary a tremendous calumny;
en.qarai: And for their faithlessness, and their uttering a monstrous calumny against Mary,
en.qaribullah: Also for their disbelief and their saying about Mary a great calumny,
en.sahih: And [We cursed them] for their disbelief and their saying against Mary a great slander,
en.sarwar: Their hearts were also sealed because of their lack of faith, their gravely slanderous accusation against Mary,
en.shakir: And for their unbelief and for their having uttered against Marium a grievous calumny.
en.transliteration: Wabikufrihim waqawlihim AAala maryama buhtanan AAatheeman
en.wahiduddin: They denied the truth and uttered a monstrous slander against Mary.
en.yusufali: That they rejected Faith; that they uttered against Mary a grave false charge;
fa.ansarian: و [نیز] به سبب کفرشان [به نبوّت عیسی] و گفتارشان بر مریمِ [پاکدامن و آراسته به عفت] که افترا و بهتان بزرگی بود [لعنتشان کردیم.]
fa.ayati: و نيز به سبب كفرشان و آن تهمت بزرگ كه به مريم زدند.
fa.bahrampour: و [نيز] به سزاى كفرشان و آن تهمت بزرگى كه به مريم زدند
fa.fooladvand: و [نيز] به سزاى كفرشان و آن تهمت بزرگى كه به مريم زدند،
fa.ghomshei: و هم به واسطه کفرشان و بهتان بزرگشان بر مریم؛
fa.khorramdel: و (خداوند بر آنان خشم گرفت) به سبب کفر ورزیدنشان، و افترای بزرگی که بر مریم بستند. [[«بُهْتَاناً»: افتراء. دروغ بزرگی که عقلها را مبهوت و حیران می‌سازد.]]
fa.khorramshahi: و به سبب کفرشان و سخنشان که به مریم بهتان بزرگی زدند
fa.makarem: و (نیز) بخاطر کفرشان، و تهمت بزرگی که بر مریم زدند.
fa.moezzi: و به کفرشان و گفتارشان در باره مریم تهمتی بزرگ‌
fa.mojtabavi: و به سبب كفرشان و دروغ‌بستن بزرگشان بر مريم،
fa.sadeqi: و (نیز) به سزای کفرشان و آن تهمت بزرگی که به مریم زدند،
